<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="3">
<summary>Thought for 3 seconds</summary>
> **Initiating Response Protocol**
> 
> I've analyzed the input "你好" and swiftly identified the user's conversational intent: a simple greeting. I'm now formulating the appropriate response, ensuring it aligns perfectly with the nuance of this opening. The goal is to provide a welcoming and contextually relevant reply.
> 
> 
> **Responding with Chinese Greeting**
> 
> I'm now choosing between the simple "你好！" and the slightly more formal "您好！". Considering the lack of context, I've opted for a polite and helpful approach. Currently, I'm leaning toward "你好！有什么我可以帮你的吗？" to maximize helpfulness.
> 
> 
</details>
你好！有什么我可以帮你的吗？
